title: 其實「十二」呢個數字有咩意義？

replies.msg:
十二生肖
十二個月
十二門徒
十二星座
十二主神
金陵十二釵

點解係十二？唔可以十？

Because (barring disfigurement) we all have twelve finger bones on each hand.

The ancient Sumerians - who also gave us units of sixty to measure time, distance, etc. - used to count with their thumbs pointing in turn to each of the finger bones, ie., the right thumb would point to the bones of the fingers of the right hand and the left thumb would do likewise with the left hand. Each finger has three obvious bones with which to keep a tally which means that the whole hand permitted counting to twelve.

The reason that they also used sixty so much is that five whole fingers times twelve finger bones equals sixty units.

We count in units of ten because we (or, at least, our ancestors) chose to count in whole fingers and thumbs, of which, again barring disfigurement, we have eight and two - or ten.

replies.msg: 我覺得 你依個問題同樣可以套用落其他數字度 好多數字都有佢既組合 所以本身冇特別既意義
